text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, today I must practice moderation! I
have been slacking a little in that regard lately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall hold myself to the same dietary restrictions
as yesterday. No, perhaps they should be even
more restrictive today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: M-my skin... It seems slightly duller than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is most certainly the fault of my restrictive
diet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't go out in public like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The condition of Mejiro McQueen's skin has
worsened due to excessive dieting. As a result,
she falls into a slump.
